providers.name: MusicXMatch Provider
providers.description: Fetches synced or plain lyrics from MusicXMatch through the local bridge server.
providers.manifestDescription: Fetches synced or plain lyrics from a local MusicXMatch bridge server.
providers.settingsHint: Run the local lyrics server and point this addon to it.

providers.name: Deezer Provider
providers.description: Fetches synced or plain lyrics from Deezer through the local bridge server.
providers.manifestDescription: Fetches synced or plain lyrics from Deezer through the local bridge server.
providers.settingsHint: Run the local lyrics server and point this addon to it.

serverConfig.title: Deezer cookie
serverConfig.hint: Required for Deezer provider. Paste your Deezer arl cookie so the local server can authenticate.
